title: Big Mom’s Broken Memory
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Charlotte Linlin, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Big Mom as Big Mom’s past explains the emotional weakness that the assassination plan tries to exploit.
scene: Big Mom’s childhood reveals the loss and confusion behind her obsession with Mother Carmel.

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Tea Party storyline with 43 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s past reframes her weakness and the emotional core of the failed assassination plan.
